mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skeleton_rag_index ( source_task_id, style, pose, template_type, openpose_tmpl, prompt_summary, keypoints_json_url, binding_data_url, layer_decomp_url, user_rating, hit_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sourceTaskId}, #{style}, #{pose}, #{templateType}, #{openposeTmpl}, #{promptSummary}, #{keypointsJsonUrl}, #{bindingDataUrl}, #{layerDecompUrl}, #{userRating}, 0, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE keypoints_json_url = VALUES(keypoints_json_url), binding_data_url = VALUES(binding_data_url), layer_decomp_url = VALUES(layer_decomp_url), user_rating = VALUES(user_rating), prompt_summary = VALUES(prompt_summary), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE skeleton_rag_index SET hit_count = hit_count + 1, last_hit_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
